subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth unto a people who comprehend. Verily, there is no God but Him - His is the creation and the command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق لقوم یفقهون انه ما من اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
